setup.description: Interactive project setup — detects your project, configures metaswarm, writes project-local files

start-task.description: Begin tracked work on a task with complexity assessment

prime.description: Load relevant knowledge from the BEADS knowledge base before starting work

review-design.description: Architecture-focused design review (single architect-agent in this POC; full 5-agent gate not yet registered)

design-review-gate.description: Automatic review gate that runs after brainstorming completes - spawns PM, Architect, Designer, Security, and CTO agents in parallel

orchestrated-execution.description: 4-phase execution loop for work units - IMPLEMENT, VALIDATE, ADVERSARIAL REVIEW, COMMIT

self-reflect.description: Extract learnings from recent PR reviews, conversations, and session patterns to update the knowledge base

handoff.description: Analyze the session and write a self-contained handoff document so a fresh agent can resume the work — outputs a single "Read XXX.md and do YYY." sentence

status.description: Show metaswarm diagnostic information — installation state, project setup, BEADS plugin status, external tools, coverage config

handle-pr-comments.description: Systematically address PR review comments from automated tools and human reviewers, with iteration loop until all threads resolved

external-tools-health.description: Check the status of external AI tools (Codex CLI, Gemini CLI) and their configuration

issue-orchestrator.description: Main coordinator per issue — spawns sub-agents, runs 4-phase execution loop

architect-agent.description: Reviews technical architecture and creates implementation plans

swarm-coordinator-agent.description: Meta-orchestrator managing multiple issues/epics in parallel across worktrees

coder-agent.description: TDD implementation of features and fixes

researcher-agent.description: Codebase exploration and prior art research

code-review-agent.description: Internal code review before PR creation

designer-agent.description: UX, API design, and developer experience review

product-manager-agent.description: Use case validation and user benefit review

security-auditor-agent.description: Security vulnerability detection and OWASP compliance

security-design-agent.description: Security review of designs before implementation

sre-agent.description: Production system monitoring and incident response (read-only)

metrics-agent.description: Collect, aggregate, and report on agent swarm performance

pr-shepherd-agent.description: PR lifecycle management through to merge

release-engineer-agent.description: Safe delivery of approved code from merge through production verification
